hooks.command: DIRTY=$(git -C "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}" status --porcelain packages/bb3-normalizer packages/migration-ir-contract docs/MIGRATION-PLANNER-BB3-DESIGN.md docs/MIGRATION-PLANNER-BB3-TASKS.md 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$DIRTY" ]; then echo '[bb3] reminder: BB-3 files have uncommitted changes. Run /ship-it before ending the session.' >&2; fi; BRANCH=$(git -C "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ] || [ "$BRANCH" = "staging" ]; then echo "[bb3] warning: on branch '$BRANCH' — BB-3 work should happen on feat/bb3-wave<N>." >&2; fi; exit 0
